column1: # Manifest of source files copied INTO the skill at build time.
# Run `./evals/build.sh` from the skill dir (or any CWD — it resolves paths) to
# refresh fixtures. The skill must remain self-contained: every file an eval
# case references MUST be listed below and present under evals/fixtures/.
# --- heroes (AF4 / AF5 paired Spring Boot project, JPA backend) ---
# --- heroes: additional aggregates cited by aggregate recipe ---
# --- heroes: interceptor (AF5 paired file does NOT exist in upstream — AF4 only) ---
# --- gamerental: alternative aggregate + storage-engine reference (Axon Server backend) ---
# --- bike-rental-extended (AF4 / AF5 paired multi-module project with saga + named queries) ---
# Saga-side AF5 supporting classes (new in AF5 — Shape B outcome)
